entities.name: Polyorchestrator Model
entities.context: A knowledge worker type that translates between domains and orchestrates specialists, achieving cross-domain leverage through coordination rather than deep expertise

entities.name: Polymath
entities.context: Historical knowledge worker type who mastered multiple fields through deep expertise, contrasted with the polyorchestrator approach

entities.name: Epistemology
entities.context: The philosophical domain this position belongs to, concerning the nature and scope of knowledge

relationships.context: Position categorized under the epistemology domain
Contrasted as an alternative approach—coordination vs mastery
